description: Five pilot queries for the V0 external-signal manual collection. Selected to validate schema and manual workflow before scaling to 20 queries.

queries.reason_selected: Single broad noun; rich Curify catalog; will surface many sub-intents across multiple clusters. Validates that the schema handles high-suggestion-volume queries without artificial limits.

known_curify_status.eval_notes: Not a tracked eval query. Mentioned in 2026-06-18 daily report as a browser-validation query for the multi-intent chip implementation.

queries.repository_evidence: Referenced in docs/daily_report/2026-06-18.md as a browser-validated query for the intent-cluster chip system. score_user_queries.cjs output: 33 strict hits, rich bucket.

queries.reason_selected: Canonical place query with documented multi-intent ambiguity (travel poster / watercolor map / city guide / itinerary / scrapbook). Validated in eval-framework-visual-intent-routing-2026-06-15.md as a worked example. Also the parent query of the sparse 'paris travel itinerary'.

known_curify_status.eval_notes: Not a tracked eval query. Paris travel itinerary (child query) is in the eval set as a WARN.

queries.repository_evidence: Named as a worked example in docs/eval-framework-visual-intent-routing-2026-06-15.md (the VIR routing doc). The Paris landmark record was semantically reviewed in claude_prompt6_5_paris_topic_review.md. The watercolor-map-infographic template explicitly generates an ordered visual tour route.

queries.reason_selected: Highest-hit query in the pilot (221 strict hits across 17 templates). Validates schema for ultra-rich queries. Mentioned in the 2026-06-18 daily report as a browser-validated query. Broad enough to span learning-materials and visual-art clusters simultaneously.

known_curify_status.eval_notes: Not a tracked eval query. Referenced in 2026-06-18 daily report as browser-validated.

queries.repository_evidence: Cited in docs/daily_report/2026-06-18.md as a browser-validation query for the intent-cluster chip implementation. Extremely high hit count indicates broad alias coverage across the science/learning content family.

queries.reason_selected: Known sparse-content query with WARN status in the eval (actual: thin, 2 results vs expected: rich). Highest-value target for external-signal research: if Bing and Pinterest show strong refinement demand for this query, it confirms a real catalog gap. The Paris watercolor-map record reviewed in Prompt 6.5 is one of the 2 matching results.

known_curify_status.eval_notes: source=prefill-pool-2026-06-14; expected=rich; actual=thin; hits=2. The discrepancy between score_user_queries (7 hits, moderate) and the eval (2 hits, thin) reflects different pipeline paths: score_user_queries uses raw alias matching; the eval pipeline applies the full strict-AND + relaxed + rewrite path with result deduplication.
known_curify_status.score_user_queries_raw: 7 hits, moderate bucket (raw alias scorer; broader than eval pipeline)

queries.repository_evidence: Explicitly in search_eval_set.json as a WARN query (prefill-pool-2026-06-14, expected=rich). Reviewed in claude_prompt6_5_paris_topic_review.md (topic: itinerary confirmed accurate for the watercolor-map template). The eval notes it was adopted from the prefill pool path A quality findings.

queries.reason_selected: Known sparse-content query with WARN status in the eval (actual: thin, 1 result vs expected: rich). Represents the diy-guides cluster. External signals may reveal whether demand is for running-specific content (content gap) or for broader fitness/checklist content (alias gap).

known_curify_status.eval_notes: source=prefill-pool-2026-06-14; expected=rich; actual=thin; hits=1. A single inspiration from the warmup-routine template family is the only match. Zero template-level matches (strict_template_count=0).

queries.repository_evidence: Explicitly in search_eval_set.json as a WARN query (prefill-pool-2026-06-14, expected=rich). Listed in the Prompt 7 plan as one of the four known-sparse queries warranting external signal research. Relevant cluster: diy-guides (fitness, step-by-step-tutorial, guides, before-after in lib/intent_taxonomy.ts).
